column9: Iter 3: partial-K interleaving with fetch-leader model. Only 1/8 WGs fetch → 27 GB/s (vs 94 GB/s). Kernel is fetch-BW-bound — can't reduce fetch parallelism.
2-STAGE PIPELINE BEATS PYTORCH: 20.73ms = 1.01x PyTorch! Fixed rank-interleaved GEMM tile mapping. Committed in iris sub-repo.
17.16ms = 1.22x PyTorch, WITHIN 0.24ms OF FICCO (16.92ms)! nfs=4 kpf=64 gm=24 fs=52. nfs=4 resonance with kpf=64.
